description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can of juice, predominantly red in color with white and pink graphic accents. The can features bold branding with the word 'Funto' prominently displayed in a playful, rounded font, and additional text such as 'CLEAR TASTE OF FUN' and 'AMAZINGLY SMOOTH' wrapping around the body. The surface is slightly worn, giving it a matte, slightly distressed appearance, and a standard pull tab is visible on the top for opening. The can includes a visible recycling symbol and a detailed nutritional information panel on one side. The overall design is typical of single-serving juice cans found in urban environments, with a metallic sheen and printed graphics. The can appears unopened and is likely filled with juice, as indicated by the labeling.
description: A red aluminum juice can labeled 'Funto' with bold graphics, a pull tab, and a visible nutrition panel. The can has a slightly worn, matte finish and urban-style branding.
description_view_0: This view shows the nutrition facts panel, recycling symbol, and part of the branding graphics.
description_view_1: This view highlights the large 'Funto' logo in white and red, with part of the pull tab visible on top.
description_view_2: The front of the can is visible here, showing the full 'Funto' logo, 'CLEAR TASTE OF FUN' slogan, and the top pull tab.
description_view_3: This view again focuses on the 'Funto' logo, with more of the can's side and pull tab visible.
